title: Bus Mechanic / Vehicle Technician
overview: Bus Mechanics maintain, repair, and service buses to ensure they operate safely and reliably. They diagnose mechanical and electrical faults, perform routine inspections, and carry out repairs on engines, brakes, transmissions, and onboard systems.
day_to_day: Inspecting buses for mechanical or electrical issues
Servicing engines, brakes, steering, and suspension systems
Using diagnostic tools to identify faults
Completing maintenance logs and service reports
Ensuring all work meets safety and compliance standards
qualifications: Level 2 or 3 Diploma in Vehicle Maintenance and Repair
Category B driving licence (Category D beneficial)
work_environment: Workshops, garages, depots; may involve shift work and outdoor repairs.
